data.description: Orange acquires 50% stake in MasOrange after signing a binding agreement with Lorca.

data.title: Analysts raise forecasts for Costco after Q1 results; Revenue $67.31B, EPS $4.50, membership fees $1.33B. Costco has 923 warehouses.
data.description: Costco Wholesale Corp. announced its first quarter fiscal 2026 financial results, exceeding expectations. The reported revenue was $67.31 billion, surpassing analyst predictions of $67.14 billion. Additionally, the company revealed adjusted earnings of $4.50 per share for the quarter, beating estimates of $4.27 per share. Membership fees totaled around $1.33 billion, showing growth from $1.17 billion in the same quarter last year. Costco currently runs 923 warehouses, with 633 situated in the U.S. For the complete article, visit a financial news platform.

data.title: Wall Street in red as tech sell-off leads to a 15% jump in VIX. Broadcom shares down 11%. Oracle down 17% after data center delays, worst loss since 2020.
data.description: On the last day of trading this week, Wall Street witnessed a sea of red as stocks experienced a broad decline, particularly driven by a tech-focused sell-off. Rivian Automotive's stock is nearing crucial resistance levels, prompting interest in the reasons behind its surge to new highs. Meanwhile, Broadcom Inc. (NASDAQ: AVGO), a prominent player in the artificial intelligence sector, saw its shares plummet by over 11% despite surpassing quarterly expectations, inciting concerns within the market on AI-related investments. The negative sentiment surrounding AI persisted from the previous day when Oracle Corp. (NYSE: ORCL) shares tumbled by 11% due to the company's increased data center spending plans, leading to worries regarding cash flow generation. A Bloomberg report on Friday revealed that some Oracle data centers linked to OpenAI would be delayed from 2027 to 2028, further unsettling investors and causing the stock to drop by an additional 6%. Over the past two trading sessions, Oracle has recorded a substantial decrease of almost 17%, marking its most significant two-day decline since March 2020. The overall downturn in chipmakers and AI-related stocks pushed the Nasdaq... (Continued on Benzinga.com)

data.title: Lavazza opens new training facility in Dallas to support growth in US markets, marking a significant milestone.
data.description: A well-known coffee company is enhancing its national training network by establishing a cutting-edge center to cater to the rising demands in key U.S. markets. Lavazza, a reputable 130-year-old coffee brand, commemorates the launch of its latest Training Center in Dallas on December 12, 2025. This initiative aims to support the company's expansion and development, meeting the needs of consumers and industry professionals in multiple locations across the country.

data.title: HCIactive revealed roadmap for Smart Policy Wallet, merging AI and blockchain concepts for next-gen digital experience.
data.description: In Columbia, Maryland, HCIactive has revealed plans for the Smart Policy Wallet, a cutting-edge digital platform merging benefits, coverage information, accumulators, and policy insights in one secure interface. Central to HCIactive's AI First and AI Everywhere approach, the Smart Policy Wallet will leverage AI for personalization, early-stage blockchain ideas, and automated processes inspired by smart contracts.

data.title: Pardee Resources Co. declares special year-end dividend of $15/share, payable Dec 18 to shareholders of record on Dec 15.
data.description: A company based in RADNOR, Pa., disclosed today that its Board of Directors has approved a special year-end dividend of $15.00 per share for shareholders. The dividend payment is scheduled for December 18, 2025, and will be distributed to shareholders of record as of December 15, 2025. The company, known as Pardee Resources Company and traded under the ticker symbol PDER on the OTC market, made this announcement.

data.title: Smearcase wins $100,000 at 2025 Real California Milk Excelerator Final Pitch Event for frozen cottage cheese.
data.description: In Tracy, California on December 12, 2025, the winner of the 7th Real California Milk Excelerator product innovation competition was announced. The California Milk Advisory Board (CMAB) and VentureFuel revealed that Smearcase emerged as the grand prize recipient. This recognition was bestowed during the 2025 RCM Excelerator event.

data.title: Tractor Supply offers stress-free holiday shopping with gifts, gear, and decor at unbeatable prices. #TSCO #Holiday|#WintrySeason
data.description: In Brentwood, Tennessee, Tractor Supply Company (NASDAQ: TSCO) is offering a wide range of gifts, gear, and décor for holiday gatherings and winter supplies at unbeatably low prices. As the largest rural lifestyle retailer in the United States, they cater to customers looking for last-minute deals and convenience in shopping. With various shopping options available, Tractor Supply ensures customers have everything they need for the cold months ahead.

data.title: Bay Area Robotics Association (BARA) connects corporates, roboticists, investors, and startups in Silicon Valley.
data.description: A new platform, the Bay Area Robotics Association (BARA), has been launched in Silicon Valley, California. This industry organization is member-driven and aims to connect corporates, roboticists, investors, and startups in the region. BARA serves as a hub for collaboration and networking within the robotics sector, facilitating partnerships and innovation. The association is set to play a significant role in fostering growth and advancement in the industry.

data.title: Mamba Brand CEO urges national hemp accountability amid rising legal concerns, stressing need for industry standards.
data.description: In Los Angeles on December 12, 2025, Dino Awadisian, the CEO of The Mamba Brand, a prominent figure in the hemp industry, has called for the implementation of uniform regulations for hemp production in the United States. Amid increasing legal ambiguity and growing public unease, Awadisian emphasized the necessity of establishing consistent guidelines. The proposal aims to address the current issues prevalent within the hemp market, with specific attention to legal uncertainties. Initiating nationwide standards for hemp manufacturing is intended to provide clarity and facilitate smoother operations within the industry. The request underscores mounting pressure on policymakers and businesses to take decisive action in ensuring a more regulated framework. This call for a standardized approach comes at a crucial juncture where the industry is witnessing escalating concerns and challenges, indicating the potential benefits of a unified regulatory system.

data.title: UAE online pet grooming retail market to reach USD 150 million by 2030, driven by increasing pet ownership and e-commerce.
data.description: A report on the UAE online pet grooming products retail market has been released, now available for review. The market, currently valued at USD 150 million, is experiencing significant growth driven by factors such as growing pet ownership, increasing incomes, and the adoption of e-commerce. Leading this trend are major cities like Dubai and Abu Dhabi, benefitting from high population density and a consumer base with a strong focus on pet-related products. The market outlook covers the period from 2025 to 2030, highlighting trends, opportunities, and growth drivers.
